findings.message: column `A1Cresult` has 1 near-duplicate category pair(s) within edit distance ≤ 2
assumptions: Levenshtein distance is character-level; short strings produce noise (cap via min_string_len)
high-d small-edit pairs may be legitimate (e.g. "USA" vs "USB" — different products)
suggested_next_checks: review pairs; consolidate via controlled vocabulary if they are semantic duplicates
for typo-driven duplicates, normalize at ingest with a fuzzy-match lookup
